verses.text: Topa in inn lampih kei leh innlamte' sepna a mawkna ahi hi. Topa in khuapi hutpih kei leh khuapi cingte' cin'na a mawkna ahi hi
Zingsangin tho baihin, gimpi-a nangma sepsa an na nek hakna zong a mawkna mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ama itte tungah a ihmut sung nangawnun a pia hi
En un, tate pen Topa' tung pana letsong hi a, tapate pen ama hong piak thupha ahi hi
Mi khat in a khangno lai-in a neih tate pen galhangpa' khutsunga a om a thaltangte tawh kibang hi
A thallawng dimin tua bang thaltang a neipa mi lungdam ahi hi. Amah guallel ngeilo ding a, zahhuai ngeilo ding hi.
